layout.title: WELSH -- Free money and pensions guidance
layout.content: WELSH -- We’ll respond as soon as we can, but this can take over five working days. For a quicker reply, [use our webchat](https://www.moneyhelper.org.uk/en/pensions-chat) between 9am and 5pm, Monday to Friday.

guidance.title: WELSH -- Get in touch with our experts
guidance.intro: WELSH -- Use this form to ask for information and guidance. We do not provide regulated financial advice.
guidance.content:
WELSH -- We offer free and impartial information and guidance to help you make the most of your money and pensions. Our service is designed to support you in making your own informed decisions based on your circumstances. Our specialists may ask you about your personal and financial circumstances, to tailor the guidance for you.

We don’t give legal or regulated financial advice or recommend specific financial products because we aren’t regulated or authorised by the Financial Conduct Authority to do so. This means we can’t tell you what the best option is for you, or what to do with your money or pension.

If you’re looking for personalised money or pensions advice or specific product recommendations, you’ll need to see a regulated financial adviser or seek legal advice.

Don’t tell us any of your banking or financial details, your National Insurance number or other sensitive personal information. As an impartial arms-length body, we don’t have access to your banking or pensions records. See our [Privacy Notice](#) for more information about your rights, as well as what data we collect and store.

generic.error: WELSH -- Please enter a valid date

expandable-section.title: WELSH -- Why are we asking this?
expandable-section.content: WELSH -- Our guidance regarding your money or pension options available may be different depending upon your age

email.label: WELSH -- Email address
email.hint: WELSH -- For example name@example.co.uk. Don’t use a shared email address.
email.error: WELSH -- Please enter a valid email address

phone-number.label: WELSH -- Phone number (optional)
phone-number.error: WELSH -- Please enter a valid phone number

post-code.label: WELSH -- Home post code (optional)
post-code.error: WELSH -- Please enter a valid postcode

expandable-section.title: WELSH -- Why are we asking this?
expandable-section.content:
WELSH -- Email and phone number allows us to reply to your enquiry.

Post code allows us to find specific services within your location. Additionally, this may be used to analyse trends by location.

money-management.label: WELSH -- Tell us about your situation and the issues you need help resolving. We can find answers for you more quickly if you can give us as much detail about your circumstances as you can. It’s also helpful for us to know if you’re vulnerable in any way (e.g. struggling with mental health, having difficulty accessing support services, living with learning difficulties).

about-debt.title: WELSH -- About debt advice with our trusted partners
about-debt.sub-title: WELSH -- Money Helper support team cannot provide debt or financial advice, as regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA).
about-debt.callout: WELSH -- Find a free debt advisor near you, online or on the phong using the [debt advice locator tool](https://www.moneyhelper.org.uk/en/money-troubles/dealing-with-debt/debt-advice-locator)
about-debt.content:
WELSH -- You can also speak to a debt advisor at our trusted partner, National Debt line at [0808 8084000](tel:08088084000) or [chat online](#)

Use this form if you need additional support or guidance in using our debt advice locator tool.

about-insurance.sub-title: WELSH -- Find a travel insurance provider if you have a serious medical condition of disability
about-insurance.callout: WELSH -- Our [travel insurance directory](https://www.moneyhelper.org.uk/en/everyday-money/insurance/use-our-travel-insurance-directory) can direct you to specialist firms that can help
about-insurance.content:
WELSH -- Our money experts cannot provide quotes, but this directory can provide you with specialist firms who are authroised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA).

[Return to Money Helper website](#)

about-state-pension.title: WELSH -- About discuss your state pension
about-state-pension.sub-title: WELSH -- Money Helper does not hold or have access to State Pension records.
about-state-pension.content:
WELSH -- To access information about your State Pension, report a change or ask a question visit [State Pension on GOV.UK](#) in the first instance.

You can also use [Check your State Pension forecast on GOV.UK.](#) This will show you:
items: WELSH -- how much State Pension you could get
WELSH -- when you can get it
WELSH -- how to increase it if you’re unlikely to get the maximum
about-state-pension.footer: WELSH -- Use this form for guidance about your State Pension forecast or State Pension information.

about-pension-tracing.title: WELSH -- About pension tracing
about-pension-tracing.sub-title: WELSH -- Money Helper does not hold or have access to pension providers’ records, and are unable to trace old or lost pensions on your behalf.
about-pension-tracing.content:
WELSH -- You can use Money Helpers four step guide on [how to find old or lost pensions](#).

The Pension Tracing Service lets you [Find pension contact details on GOV.UK](#) or you can use [Gretel](#), a free service to trace lost pensions.

Use this form if you need additional support or guidance in using pension tracing and lost pension tracking services.
